title: Day 17: Day 17 — Paperwork & Logistics
content:
# Day 17 — Paperwork & Logistics

## Topic
Managing paperwork and transition logistics without surprises

## 3–5 Key Points
- **Clarify every required document:** Make a checklist for agreements, brokerage onboarding forms, MLS paperwork, and compliance disclosures.
- **Handle licensing and E&O early:** Confirm license transfer steps, E&O coverage timing, and any local board requirements before start day.
- **Set clear transition expectations:** Define what happens in week one, who supports setup, and what "ready to produce" looks like.
- **Prevent avoidable delays:** Missing signatures, incomplete forms, and unclear ownership are the main bottlenecks—assign responsibility upfront.
- **Use a standardized onboarding sequence:** A repeatable process improves speed, consistency, and agent confidence.

## Why It Matters
Great recruiting can still fail at execution if the transition feels chaotic. Clean paperwork and logistics reduce friction, protect compliance, and help new agents start productive quickly instead of getting stuck in admin delays.
